theme.light_desc: Ukubukeka okuhlanzekile nokukhanyayo, okulungele izimo zegumbi elikhanyayo.

language.title: Ulimi
language.subtitle: Khetha Ulimi Lohlelo Lokusebenza
language.description: Enza ngendlela oyifisayo ulimi lwesibonisi sohlelo lokusebenza lwe-Ba-Yu ngokuya ngokuthanda kwakho.
language.info: Izinguquko zolimi zizosetshenziswa ngokushesha kuzo zonke izici zesixhumi esibonakalayo sohlelo lokusebenza. Okuqukethwe okudalwe ngabasebenzisi (amanothi, amazwana) kuhlala kungolimi lwakho loqobo.

auth.start_journey_desc: Bhalisa futhi wabelane ngenothi lakho lokuqala.

privacy_settings.success_public: I-akhawunti isethwe ngempumelelo ukuthi ibe Sesidlangalaleni

privacy_settings.deactivate_failed: Yehlulekile ukuvala i-akhawunti. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
privacy_settings.title: Ubumfihlo Ne-akhawunti
privacy_settings.desc_private: Abalandeli kuphela abangabuka iphrofayela yakho namanothi. Amazwana akho kokuthunyelwe kwabanye asazobonakala esidlangalaleni.
privacy_settings.desc_public: Wonke umuntu angabuka iphrofayela yakho namanothi, futhi ahlanganyele nokuqukethwe owabelana ngakho.
privacy_settings.deactivate_desc: I-akhawunti yakho izofihlwa (ithule) epulatifomu ye-Ba-Yu. Iphrofayela yakho, amanothi, namazwana ngeke kubonakale kwabanye abasebenzisi. Uma ungangeni futhi phakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-30, yonke idatha yakho izosuswa unomphela.
privacy_settings.dialog_desc: I-akhawunti yakho izofihlwa emphakathini bese ungena esimweni Sokungalali izinsuku ezingu-30. Ungaphinda uyisebenzise ngokungena ngaphambi kokuphelelwa yisikhathi kwezinsuku ezingu-30. Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuqhubeka?

follow_requests.title: Landela Izicelo
follow_requests.no_requests: Azikho izicelo ezintsha zokulandela. Uma othile ecela ukukulandela, ungakuphatha lapha.

privacy_page.hero_desc: Idatha yakho iphephile nge-Ba-Yu. Sigcina ukubeka izinto obala nokuvikelwa kwedatha njengokubaluleke kakhulu kwethu.
privacy_page.collection_desc: Siqoqa kuphela ulwazi oluncane oludingekayo ukuze sisekele inqubo yakho yokufunda:

terms_page.title: Imigomo Nemibandela
terms_page.hero_desc: Igcine ukubuyekezwa: May 7, 2026. Imithetho ye-ecosystem yokufunda ye-Ba-Yu enethezekile.
terms_page.section1_desc: Ngokufinyelela nokusebenzisa inkundla ye-Ba-Yu, uthathwa njengofundile, waqonda, futhi wavuma ukuboshwa yile Migomo Nemibandela. Uma ungavumelani, sicela ungaqhubeki usebenzise izinsiza zethu ukuze uvikeleke ngokufanayo.
terms_page.section2_desc: Ukuze usebenzise isici sokwabelana ngamanothi, kudingeka ubhalise ngolwazi olunembile. Ubophezelekile ngokugcwele kulokhu:
section2_items: Yonke imisebenzi eyenzeka ngaphansi kwe-akhawunti yakho.
terms_page.section3_quote: "Noma yimaphi amanothi owalayishayo ku-Ba-Yu ahlala engawakho. Nokho, ngokuwalayisha, unikeza u-Ba-Yu ilayisense yokubonisa, ukusabalalisa, nokukhuthaza lokho okuqukethwe ngaphakathi kwengxenyekazi ye-ecosystem yethu ngezinjongo zemfundo."
allowed_items: Ilanda ukuze uthole ireferensi yomuntu siqu.
terms_page.contact: Unemibuzo? Xhumana support@ba-yu.id

community_guidelines.title: Izinkombandlela Zomphakathi
community_guidelines.hero_desc: Masidale indawo yokufunda ephephile, enhle, futhi esekelayo ku-Ba-Yu.

values.title: Ukuhloniphana
values.desc: Khulumisana ngesizotha, noma ngabe uphawula noma unikeza ukugxeka okwakhayo.

values.title: Ezemfundo & Okuhle
values.desc: Gxila ekusabalaliseni ulwazi futhi usekele abanye abafundi.

community_guidelines.rules_desc: Izenzo ezilandelayo zingase zibangele ukususwa noma ukwehlisa i-akhawunti:
rules: Inkulumo enenzondo, ukucwasa, noma ukuhlukumeza ngokohlanga.
Ugaxekile, izinyuso ezingekho emthethweni, noma ukukhwabanisa.

help_page.title: Isikhungo Sosizo
help_page.hero_desc: Thola izimpendulo noma uthinte ithimba lethu losekelo ngezansi.

faqs.a: Ukuze ube Uchwepheshe, kufanele wabelane njalo ngamanothi ekhwalithi. Uma amanothi akho evamise ukuba sesigabeni 'Okudumile' futhi ethola ukuthandwa okuningi, ithimba lethu lomlawuli lizowabuyekeza futhi likunikeze isimo sokuba Ungcweti.
Yebo! Ekhasini ngalinye lemininingwane yenothi, ungacindezela inkinobho ethi Landa ekhoneni eliphezulu kwesokudla noma ezansi kokuqukethwe ukuze ukugcine ngefomethi ye-PDF.
Qiniseka ukuthi i-imeyili nephasiwedi oyifakile kulungile. Uma usanda kususa i-akhawunti yakho, i-akhawunti yakho kungenzeka isesimweni sokungalali. Zama ukungena futhi ukuze uyisebenzise.
Ekhasini lokuthatha amanothi, chofoza isithonjana sesibali kubha yamathuluzi eseceleni ukuze uvule umhleli wefomula. Ungabhala amafomula usebenzisa ifomethi ye-KaTeX.

Ungagcina amanothi owathandayo ngokuchofoza isithonjana se-'Bhumaka' ekhoneni eliphezulu kwesokudla sekhadi lenothi noma ikhasi lemininingwane yenothi. Amanothi alondoloziwe azovela kuthebhu ethi 'Kulondoloziwe' yephrofayela yakho.

faqs.q: Ingabe amanothi ami angavinjelwa ukuze abalandeli kuphela bakwazi ukubuka?
faqs.a: Yebo, kunjalo! Ungasetha i-akhawunti yakho ibe yimfihlo usebenzisa Izilungiselelo > Ubumfihlo & Imenyu ye-akhawunti. Nge-akhawunti eyimfihlo, abasebenzisi kuphela obagunyazayo njengabalandeli abangakwazi ukufunda okuqukethwe okugcwele kwamanothi akho.

Uma uthola inothi eliqukethe ukukopela, inkulumo enenzondo, noma okunye ukwephulwa, ungachofoza isithonjana samachashazi amathathu (Izinketho) ekhoneni eliphezulu kwesokudla senothi, bese ukhetha u-'Bika'. Ithimba lethu lizoyibuyekeza maduze.

Abasebenzisi abanesimo Sochwepheshe bazothola ibheji yokuqinisekisa isheke elinsomi kuphrofayela yabo. Amanothi ababelana ngawo azothola umaka othi 'Kuqinisekisiwe' okwandisa ukwethembeka kokokusebenza, kanye nelungelo lokukhetha amanothi abanye abafundi.

Amanothi athunyelwe Kungcweti angase enqatshwe uma ukukopela kutholwa, kunokulungiswa kwesithombe okungalungile, noma kuqukethe amafomula/imibono engalungile. Ungafunda izibuyekezo zempendulo yochwepheshe emininingwaneni yakho yamanothi ukuze uyithuthukise.
Cha, i-Ba-Yu imahhala ngokuphelele kubo bonke abafundi nothisha kulo lonke elase-Indonesia ukuze bayisebenzise ukwabelana ngolwazi namanothi okutadisha ahlelekile!

about_page.title: Mayelana NATHI
about_page.hero_desc: Sondela ohambweni, umgomo, kanye nethimba ngemuva kwe-Ba-Yu Platform.
about_page.vision_desc: Sikholelwa ukuthi wonke umfundi ufanelwe ukufinyelela okulinganayo ezintweni zekhwalithi. I-Ba-Yu yakhelwe ukwenza lula ukushintshana kwamanothi okulungile, okuphephile, nokufinyeleleka kwabafundi kulo lonke elase-Indonesia.
about_page.community_desc: Kungenele izinkulungwane zabafundi nongoti bezikhungo zemfundo ezahlukene. Ngezinhlelo eziqinile zokuqinisekisa kanye nokubika, sigcina lesi simiso sezinto eziphilayo silungile futhi sakha.

notif.cert_acc_msg_2: Siyakuhalalisela! Isicelo sakho sokuqinisekisa uchwepheshe se-{{field}} sigunyazwe uMlawuli.
notif.cert_rej_msg_2: Siyaxolisa, isicelo sakho sesitifiketi sochwepheshe se-{{field}} asikwazi ukugunyazwa ngalesi sikhathi.
notif.report_del_note_msg: Inothi lakho elithi "{{title}}" lisuswe uMphathi ngenxa yokwephula izinkombandlela zethu zomphakathi. Isizathu somlawuli: {{reason}}
notif.report_del_comment_msg: Amazwana akho asusiwe u-Admin ngenxa yokwephula izinkombandlela zethu zomphakathi. Isizathu somlawuli: {{reason}}
notif.report_warn_note_msg: Inothi lakho elithi "{{title}}" ibikelwe: {{reason}}. Ithimba lethu lochwepheshe/labaphathi lizoyibuyekeza.
notif.report_recv_note_msg: Umbiko wakho wesaziso "{{title}}" okwamanje ubuyekezwa ithimba lethu.
notif.report_recv_user_msg: Umbiko wakho womsebenzisi @{{username}} okwamanje ubuyekezwa umlawuli.
notif.report_rej_msg: Umbiko wakho unqatshwe umlawuli ngenxa yesizathu esilandelayo: {{reason}}

notif_detail.title: Imininingwane yomlayezo
notif_detail.not_found_desc: Lo mlayezo kungenzeka ukuthi ususiwe noma awusatholakali.

landing.philosophy_text: Sikholelwa ukuthi imfundo engcono kakhulu izalwa ngokubambisana. U-Ba-Yu ulapha ukuze akusize uhlele imibono, wabelane ngemininingwane, futhi nikhule ndawonye emphakathini ofundayo osekelayo.
landing.philosophy_motto: I-Ba-Yu Philosophy - Funda, Yabelana, Khulisani Ndawonye
landing.row1_4: Ukusuka Esikoleni Samabanga Aphansi kuya Ekolishi
landing.subj_math_desc: Amafomula ayinkimbinkimbi e-LaTeX & Calculus manje aqondakala kalula.
landing.subj_science_desc: Kusukela emithethweni ye-thermodynamics kuya ekwakhekeni kwamaseli ezinto eziphilayo.
landing.subj_lang_desc: Ukuhlaziywa kohlelo lolimi, iphrozi, nezinkulumo zolimi.
landing.subj_social_desc: Amamephu we-Tectonic, izibalo zabantu kanye nesakhiwo sezenhlalo yomphakathi.
landing.subj_coding_desc: Qaphela amazwibela ekhodi, imibhalo ye-API, kanye ne-algorithm logic.
landing.subj_history_desc: Izikhathi zempucuko, izinqolobane zomlando, nezinsalela zasendulo.
landing.cockpit_latex_desc: Bhala amafomula ezibalo nesayensi ngobuhle njengamajenali ezemfundo achwepheshile usebenzisa injini enikezela ngesivinini esiphezulu ye-KaTeX.
landing.cockpit_verif_desc: Inothi ngalinye elibalulekile lingabuyekezwa uchwepheshe wesifundo noma uthisha oqinisekisiwe ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukunemba kwamafomula nemiqondo.
landing.cockpit_search_desc: Sesha amagama angukhiye, izihloko, ngisho namafomula athile e-LaTeX kuwo wonke amarekhodi omphakathi ngokushesha nje ngokuphazima kweso.
landing.cockpit_comm_desc: Yakha umkhuba wokufunda wansuku zonke ongashintshi nezinkulungwane zabanye abafundi abanesistimu ye-streak esebenzisanayo nemiklomelo ekhethekile.
landing.hero_desc: Guqula amanothi akho okufunda ukusuka esikoleni samabanga aphansi kuye ekolishi ube yiphothifoliyo ehlelekile yemininingwane enomhleli olula we-LaTeX.
landing.multilang_desc: I-Ba-Yu isekela ukuxhumana ngezilimi ezingu-40+, okuvumela abafundi abavela emhlabeni wonke ukuthi basebenzisane futhi bafunde ngokunethezeka besebenzisa inkundla yethu.
landing.feature_desc: Sidizayine i-ecosystem ehlakaniphile yokuthatha amanothi ukuze ikusize uhlele, uqinisekise, futhi uphathe kahle isifundo ngasinye ngempumelelo.
landing.feat1_desc: Bhala izibalo, izibalo, nesayensi amafomula ngobuhle njengamajenali ezemfundo achwepheshile usebenzisa injini enikeza isivinini esikhulu se-KaTeX.
landing.feat2_desc: Akusangabazeki ukuthi indaba ayilungile. Funda ngokuthula kwengqondo kumanothi athembekile agunyazwe ababuyekezi abangochwepheshe.
landing.feat3_desc: Yakha umkhuba oqinile wokufunda wansuku zonke nezinkulungwane zabanye abafundi ngesistimu ye-streak yansuku zonke esebenzisanayo.
landing.feat4_desc: Sesha amafomula athile e-LaTeX, imibono ye-physics, noma amazwibela ohlelo kuwo wonke amarekhodi omphakathi ngokushesha ngama-millisecond.
landing.feat5_desc: Yabelana ngamanothi akho futhi uxoxe ngamafomula esayensi nekhodi yokuhlela nezinkulungwane zabanye abafundi abazinikele kakhulu.
landing.cta_desc: Joyina mahhala futhi uthole indlela ehlelekile yokuhlela amanothi akho kanye nemininingwane yocwaningo.

users.fetch_all_success: Ibuyise ngempumelelo uhlu lwabo bonke abasebenzisi
users.username_taken: Igama lomsebenzisi selivele lisetshenziswa omunye umsebenzisi.
users.username_cooldown_error: Usanda kushintsha igama lakho lomsebenzisi. Sicela ulinde olunye usuku olungu-{{daysLeft}}.
users.demote_success: Kwehliswe ngempumelelo ukusuka ku-{{oldRole}} ukuya kumsebenzisi ojwayelekile.
users.account_deactivated: I-akhawunti yenziwe yavalwa ngempumelelo futhi yafakwa i-Dormant.

verify_email.title: Qinisekisa i-imeyili yakho
verify_email.description: Sithumele isixhumanisi sokuqinisekisa ekhelini lakho le-imeyili. Sicela uchofoze isixhumanisi ukuqinisekisa i-akhawunti yakho futhi uthole ukufinyelela okugcwele.
verify_email.spam_note: Uma ungayiboni i-imeyili, sicela uhlole ifolda yakho yespam noma ye-junk.
verify_email.verification_success_desc: I-akhawunti yakho iqinisekiswe ngempumelelo. Manje ungajabulela zonke izici.

verify_email_result.success_desc: I-imeyili yakho iqinisekiswe ngempumelelo. Manje ungajabulela zonke izici zohlelo lokusebenza.
verify_email_result.failed_desc: Isixhumanisi sokuqinisekisa asivumelekile noma siphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela ucele isixhumanisi esisha.
